label: Sector Rotation Hybrid
description:
Early prototype combining momentum-ranked sector rotation with a second composite signal over the 11 sector ETFs. SUPERSEDED: the validated sector_momentum covers the momentum-rotation space with the full v2 pipeline; the hybrid's extra signal was never validated.
First-pass basket run (9 sector ETFs, 1998-2026, 108 monthly trades) scored Sharpe ~0.75 (3/3 significance tests, gross and net). CAGR (~10.5%) and max-drawdown (~-38%) are rough estimates (the prototype summary saved only Sharpe), pending the strategy's own equity curve.
reference: Superseded by sector_momentum (Moskowitz & Grinblatt 1999 lineage); hybrid blend proprietary
